title: Lodestar Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Oracle manipulation followed by flash loan on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates oracle price and then uses flash loan in the same tx

summary: The attacker manipulated the price oracle of plvGLP collateral, allowing them to use a flash loan to drain the lending pool. A guard could have blocked the transaction if it detected price manipulation followed by a flash loan in the same transaction.
